rationale: No conflict. The rule governs use of school bond proceeds for safety compliance; it does not reference or depend on homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 45.1011. USE OF BOND PROCEEDS FOR SCHOOL SAFETY COMPLIANCE.
_note: Rule text concerns bond proceeds usage priorities, not property tax exemptions. No textual dependency on Tax Code §11.13(b).
